MASTER CALENDAR FEE WAIVER HEARING ON MAR-18-2026 IN DEPT. 206 - HEARING ON APPLICANT MICHAEL RAY WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES. DENIED AS TO COURT-APPOINTED INTERPRETER FEES FOR A WITNESS; FEES FOR A PEACE OFFICER TO TESTIFY IN COURT; FEES FOR COURT-APPOINTED EXPERTS; AND COURT APPOINTED LAWYER. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST, CLERK: V WU, NOT REPORTED (D206)
